sections.short-biography: Failed to ambush Quan Zong, sent to order Cao Xiu to bury his mother and return to palace.

full_text:
Xue Qiao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Qiao. Failed to ambush Quan Zong, sent to order Cao Xiu to bury his mother and return to palace. Xue Qiao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
